CE1.justification: Decision and log both made from agent-side reads; the user was asked to load nothing.

CE2.justification: One compact paragraph plus a closing 'flagging this in the daybook' line — mostly tight, light meta-narration.

CE3.justification: Named the daybook path explicitly and gave the reason ('so the conversation is recoverable') in one clause.

CE4.justification: Sole artifact is a single daybook log entry committed cleanly; nothing partial would be stranded.
